# Testimonies

> A faith-based community for sharing spiritual testimonies, seeking discerning counsel, reading scripture, and growing in truth together.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Landing page introducing the community.
- [Feed](/feed): Public testimonies from the community.
- [Thinkers](/thinkers): Share thoughts and receive a spiritual attack analysis.
- [Discernment](/discernment): Seek counsel from Nathan, a discerning AI counselor.
- [Bible](/bible): Search scripture and read the verse of the day.
- [Blog](/blog): Long-form reflections on faith and truth.
- [Sign in](/login): Account access.
